---
title: "Sir Walter Besant"
---

## Sir Walter Besant

**Dates:** 1836-1901

### Description

novelist and founder of the Society of Authors

### Biography

He was knighted in 1895.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 21 [1899]
- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge,  [15 August 1899]   ](../letters/3418_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- [To Sir Walter Besant, Feb 8th [1899?]](../letters/3395_To_Sir_Walter_Besant.html)
- [To Sir Walter Besant, Febry 7th [1899?][[footnote:1]]](../letters/3394_To_Sir_Walter_Besant.html)
- Letter from 2nd. May 1896
- Letter from March 9th 1895
- Letter from May 8th [1894?]
- Letter from April. 8. 1889.
- Letter from Febry 21st 1889
- Letter from Jany 23d 1884
- Letter from March 18th 1879

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
